user.title: Add Hanchu ESS inverter
user.description: Pick a discovered inverter or enter its BLE address manually.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Hanchu ESS inverter
reconfigure.description: Update the BLE details for this inverter.

error.invalid_address: Enter a valid Bluetooth MAC address.
error.address_change_not_supported: Remove and re-add the inverter to change its BLE address.

abort.not_supported: This discovered Hanchu device is not a supported inverter.
